column2:
Well, I come from...
Pembuka klasik untuk Part 1 tentang asal. "Well" memberi waktu berpikir 1 detik.
"Where are you from?" - "Well, I come from Bandung, a city in West Java, Indonesia."

column1: Describing size and location of hometown
column2:
It's a small/big city in...
Setelah menyebut nama kota, jelaskan ukuran dan lokasinya.
"It's a fairly big city in the western part of Java, about three hours from Jakarta."

column1: Saying what you love about your hometown
column2:
What I love about my hometown is...
Struktur cleft sentence — terdengar lebih natural dari "I love...".
"What I love about my hometown is the cool weather and the friendly people."

I'm currently studying...
Pakai present continuous untuk studi yang sedang berlangsung. "Currently" /ˈkɜːrəntli/.
"I'm currently studying in my final year of high school, preparing for university."

I've just finished...
Present perfect untuk hal yang baru saja selesai dan masih relevan.
"I've just finished my national exam and I'm waiting for the results."

I'm planning to study...
Untuk rencana yang sudah diputuskan tapi belum dimulai.
"I'm planning to study computer science at university next year, hopefully abroad."

In my free time...
Frasa pembuka standar tapi efektif. Ucapkan dengan rileks.
"In my free time, I usually play football with my friends or watch movies at home."

column1: Expressing strong interest in a hobby
column2:
I'm really into...
Idiom yang sangat natural — lebih hidup daripada "I like".
"I'm really into photography these days. I take my camera everywhere I go."

column1: Highlighting favorite part of a hobby
column2:
What I enjoy most is...
Cleft sentence lagi — band 6.5+ menggunakan ini natural.
"What I enjoy most is the feeling of being outdoors and capturing moments."

On a typical day...
Lebih elegan daripada "Every day". "Typical" /ˈtɪpɪkəl/.
"On a typical day, I wake up around six and have breakfast with my family."

I usually start by...
Pakai gerund (-ing) setelahnya. Menunjukkan grammar control.
"I usually start by checking my phone and then making a cup of tea."

In the evening I tend to...
"Tend to" = cenderung — lebih halus daripada "always".
"In the evening I tend to relax with a book or chat with my family before bed."

I'd like to talk about...
Pembuka aman dan jelas untuk cue card. Ucapkan tenang.
"I'd like to talk about my grandfather, who is the most inspiring person I know."

The thing/place/person I want to describe is...
Sangat berguna jika lupa pembuka — selalu cocok dengan cue card.
"The place I want to describe is a small beach in Bali called Nyang Nyang."

Let me tell you about...
Lebih conversational, cocok untuk topik personal.
"Let me tell you about an experience that completely changed my perspective."

It's the kind of place/thing that...
Memungkinkan deskripsi panjang dengan relative clause.
"It's the kind of place that makes you forget about all your problems the moment you arrive."

What makes it special is...
Cleft sentence untuk menekankan keunikan — examiner suka ini.
"What makes it special is the way the light hits the water at sunset."

It's particularly known for...
"Particularly" /pəˈtɪkjʊləli/ — kata penghubung band tinggi.
"It's particularly known for its incredible street food and warm atmosphere."

It all started when...
Pembuka narasi klasik. Past simple wajib setelahnya.
"It all started when I was about ten years old and visited my uncle's farm."

What happened was...
Cleft yang membuat audiens penasaran — sangat natural.
"What happened was, I got completely lost on the way back to the hotel."

column1: Showing a turn in the story
column2:
At first... but then...
Struktur kontras klasik untuk story development.
"At first I was really nervous, but then I realised everyone was just as scared as me."

Eventually...
/ɪˈventʃuəli/ — penanda waktu band tinggi, hindari "finally" terus.
"Eventually, after about two hours of walking, I found my way back to the main road."

Looking back...
Ideal untuk akhir Part 2 — menunjukkan refleksi dewasa.
"Looking back, I realise that experience taught me to be more independent."

All in all...
Idiom penutup yang sangat natural. Ucapkan satu napas.
"All in all, it was one of the best holidays I've ever had with my family."

It's an experience I'll never forget.
Penutup emosional yang clean — examiner tahu Anda selesai.
"It really moved me, and honestly, it's an experience I'll never forget."

Personally, I believe...
Pembuka opini paling aman. "Personally" /ˈpɜːsənəli/.
"Personally, I believe technology has done more good than harm in education."

In my view...
Sedikit lebih formal — bagus untuk Part 3 yang abstrak.
"In my view, governments should invest more in renewable energy sources."

I'd say that...
"I would say" disingkat — terdengar fluent dan tidak terlalu pasti.
"I'd say that most young people today value experience over material things."

If you ask me...
Idiomatic — menunjukkan natural English untuk band 6.5+.
"If you ask me, social media has changed the way we communicate forever."

I couldn't agree more.
Setuju 100%. Hati-hati, pakai sekali saja per tes.
"That's a really important point — I couldn't agree more with what you're saying."

Absolutely.
/ˈæbsəluːtli/ — pendek tapi powerful. Diikuti elaborasi.
"Absolutely. I think education is the foundation of any successful society."

I'm not sure I agree...
Cara halus untuk tidak setuju — sangat British dan sopan.
"I'm not sure I agree with that, actually. I think the situation is more complex."

I see your point, but...
Klasik diplomatic — examiner suka melihat balanced thinking.
"I see your point, but I'd argue that face-to-face communication is still essential."

I'd have to disagree to some extent.
Frasa band tinggi — menunjukkan nuance dalam berpendapat.
"I'd have to disagree to some extent. While that's true for adults, it's different for kids."

It's likely that...
/ˈlaɪkli/ — modal alternatif yang sophisticated.
"It's likely that remote work will become the norm rather than the exception."

I would imagine...
Sangat British — terdengar thoughtful, tidak overconfident.
"I would imagine that future generations will rely even more heavily on AI."

It probably depends on...
Phrase yang menyelamatkan saat tidak yakin — sangat fleksibel.
"It probably depends on the country and how the government handles the issue."

On the whole...
Idiom band tinggi untuk overview. Bukan "in general" terus.
"On the whole, I think people today are more open-minded than previous generations."

By and large...
Idiom — menunjukkan vocabulary range. Pronounce /baɪ ən lɑːdʒ/.
"By and large, young people are more environmentally aware these days."

Generally speaking...
Aman dan natural. Pakai di awal kalimat dengan koma.
"Generally speaking, big cities offer more opportunities but less peace of mind."

That's a great question.
Pujian halus untuk examiner sambil cari ide. Jangan overuse.
"That's a great question. I haven't really thought about it before, but..."

Let me think for a moment...
Jujur dan natural — jauh lebih baik daripada diam atau "ehmmm".
"Hmm, let me think for a moment... I suppose the main reason would be cost."

Hmm, that's an interesting one.
Variasi filler — "one" merujuk ke question. Sangat conversational.
"Hmm, that's an interesting one. I'd probably say it's because of cultural differences."

On top of that...
Idiomatic linker — lebih hidup daripada "additionally".
"It's affordable, and on top of that, the quality is really impressive."

What's more...
Penghubung band tinggi untuk menambah poin penting.
"It saves time, and what's more, it actually saves money in the long run."

What I mean is...
Pakai jika merasa belum jelas — menunjukkan self-awareness.
"What I mean is, it's not about the money — it's about the experience itself."

In other words...
Discourse marker klasik untuk paraphrase — examiner reward ini.
"They're investing in the future. In other words, they're thinking long-term."

Or rather...
Cara elegan untuk koreksi diri tanpa panik.
"It happened five years ago, or rather, six years ago — I just remembered."

I should say...
Halus untuk memperbaiki atau memperjelas pernyataan sebelumnya.
"It was difficult — I should say, it was challenging but very rewarding."

So yeah, that's pretty much it.
Penutup conversational yang sinyalkan ke examiner Anda selesai.
"...and I still keep in touch with him today. So yeah, that's pretty much it."
